The table size(row x col) is: (5 x 3)
[TIME][TIMEINSTANT][DATE1]
[1970-01-01 07:25:12][2011-09-12 22:10:47][2011-08-23 00:00:00]
[1970-01-01 10:10:10][2011-06-10 08:04:36][2011-08-19 00:00:00]
